listOfQuestions.question: Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: An engine powered by steam pressure?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: A factory that produces cloth or yarn?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Growth of towns and cities as people move for work?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: A human-made waterway used for transport?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: A transport system using trains on tracks?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Extracting coal to fuel industry and transport?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: A place where iron is produced or processed?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Making large quantities of standardized goods?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Splitting work into specialized tasks?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: An approach favoring limited government interference in markets?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: An organization that represents workers' interests?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Employment of children, often under harsh conditions?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Efforts to improve sanitation and living conditions?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: A legal right protecting an invention?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: A person who organizes and takes risks in business?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Money or assets used to support production?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Home-based production before or alongside factories?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Organized efforts to improve workers' rights and conditions?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Using machines to perform work formerly done by hand?
Which Industrial Revolution concept is described by this clue: Organizing production in centralized workplaces with machinery?
